summary: Tested BidBlitz Penny Auction Platform after backend refactoring from monolithic to modular architecture. Backend APIs are working correctly (28/29 tests passed). Frontend loads and displays auctions correctly. Found one frontend bug on Winners page showing NaN values.

minor.issue: Root endpoint returns frontend HTML instead of API JSON (expected behavior for public URL)

ui_bugs.issue: Statistics show 'NaN' values - frontend expects savings_percent, final_price, retail_price fields but API returns nested product object

backend.auctions: PASS - auctions with product details returned

frontend.main_page: PASS - BidBlitz branding, navigation, auction cards visible
frontend.auctions_page: PASS - 2 active auctions with prices, timers, bid buttons
frontend.winners_page: PARTIAL - page loads but stats show NaN

action_items: Fix Winners.js to properly extract product data from nested object (product.retail_price, current_price as final_price, calculate savings_percent)
Consider adding final_price and savings_percent to /api/winners response for cleaner frontend code
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all routers working correctly
Bot seeding and background bidder task functioning
WebSocket endpoints defined but not tested (would need real-time test)
Authentication flow working with JWT tokens

success_rate.frontend: 90% (pages load, minor display bug on Winners)

seed_data_creation: Bot seeding tested - creates 20 bots with German names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic to modular architecture is complete and working. All API endpoints functional. Frontend has minor bug on Winners page where stats show NaN - needs to extract data from nested product object. Login flow works via API but frontend redirect may need verification. WebSocket real-time updates not tested.
